Step Into The Future with Retik Finance

Retik Finance innovates in DeFi with its Futuristic DeFi Debit Cards, Smart Crypto Payment Gateway, AI-Powered Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Lending and Multi-Chain Non-Custodial Highly Secured DeFi Wallet, aiming to redefine global transactions.

Listing Price = $0.15

USDT Raised: $ 32,050,000

We are thrilled to announce the successful conclusion of the Retik Finance Presale, months ahead of schedule! Your trust and support have been invaluable in laying the foundation for Retik's vision to become a reality.

In the days ahead, we'll be sharing vital details about token listing and vesting schedule on our social media channels. Token claims have not begun yet, Any individual who contacts you regarding RETIK token claims is fake.

Please be cautious and verify our socials before interacting. Remember, we never initiate messages first. Also, protect your keys and seed phrases—never share them

If your wallet is hacked/compromised, please contact us at: https://retik.com/help

To celebrate the success of Retik Finance presale, We're giving away $5000 to 25 lucky winners.

Join $5000 Celebration Giveaway

What is Retik?

RETIK stands as a dynamic DeFi token built upon the Ethereum mainnet, adhering to the ERC20 standard. With a total supply of 1 billion (1,000,000,000), RETIK powers the Retik Finance ecosystem, driving decentralized transactions and fueling the innovative financial solutions that define our platform's essence.
